component_coverage.description: Core validation function exercised with arbitrary pointers
TLS cache lookup exercised through repeated validations
Bloom filter pre-check via mixed valid/invalid addresses
Arena lookup exercised through full pipeline validation
Read/write permission checking on validation outcomes

fuzzing_strategies.description: Arbitrary pointer addresses including edge cases
fuzzing_strategies.evidence: ValidateAddress operation feeds arbitrary u64 addresses into validate()

fuzzing_strategies.description: Pointer arithmetic on valid allocations (alloc ± delta)
fuzzing_strategies.evidence: ValidateNearMiss derives pointer offsets from live allocations
ValidateNearMiss checks before-base, one-past-end, and just-past-end addresses
Structured operations mix live allocation addresses with arbitrary foreign addresses

state_transitions.via: RevalidateForCache validates the same live pointer twice
Free operation validates the just-freed pointer as a temporal violation
Requires multiple alloc/free cycles to fill quarantine
ValidateAddress operation validates arbitrary foreign addresses

cache_coherence.evidence: RevalidateForCache plus Free exercises cache hit and invalidation paths
Random addresses naturally probe bloom filter false positive paths
Allocation/free cycles exercise arena lifecycle and reuse candidates

invariant_checks.description: Zero false negatives (unsafe passed as safe)
invariant_checks.evidence: validate() is exercised on all input addresses; outcomes queried
Free operation asserts live pointer transitions to temporal violation
DoubleFreeLast asserts repeated free is detected deterministically

invariant_checks.description: Bounded latency for all validation paths
invariant_checks.evidence: Fuzz target exercises all paths; libfuzzer detects hangs

gap_analysis.description: Requires multiple alloc/free cycles to fill quarantine

success_criteria.zero_false_negatives: validate() must never report unsafe pointer as safe
success_criteria.all_transitions_exercised: All SafetyState transitions covered by fuzz input
success_criteria.no_deadlocks: No deadlocks under concurrent validation load
success_criteria.bounded_latency: All validation paths complete within latency budget

fuzz_primary.description: Primary fuzz evidence for the membrane validation pipeline target.
smoke_commands: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo check --manifest-path crates/frankenlibc-fuzz/Cargo.toml --bin fuzz_membrane

telemetry_primary.description: Structured report and JSONL rows emitted by scripts/check_fuzz_membrane_validation.sh.
